contractCoverage.obligation: Silence must not count; a real >60s untranscribed speech span must be detectable
Collapse duplicate slides but never drop distinct slides (bias to retention)
Incrementally-built slides must be kept as distinct steps, not collapsed
Parse VTT/json3 and select usable captions vs fall back

contractCoverage.reason: G001 is a deterministic library/algorithm core; no GUI/web surface exists in this story (UI is deferred per spec non-goals).

surfaceEvidence.reason: No GUI in G001; UI deferred per spec non-goals.
CLI entrypoint is built in G003; G001 covers library internals only.

adversarialCases.scenario: Unsorted/overlapping speech spans with an uncovered gap exactly at MAX_GAP_SEC and just beyond
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Gap measured only within speech; long silence passes, real >60s untranscribed span fails
0 <= gap <= total merged speech duration (never negative, never exceeds speech)

adversarialCases.scenario: Metrics exactly at and just under 0.90/0.92 thresholds; high-hist+low-ssim layout change
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Same-slide only when BOTH metrics clear; layout change kept (no over-dedup)

adversarialCases.scenario: Long build-up sequence with interleaved exact duplicates and a reordered-line variant
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Build-up steps kept as distinct, exact duplicates dropped, unrelated text is new

adversarialCases.scenario: Empty/malformed VTT, comma vs dot millis, tag stripping, empty json3 events, invalid JSON
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Parsers do not crash on malformed input; invalid json3 raises the documented JSONDecodeError contract

iteration.evidence: Architect findings (1 COMMENT pass with MEDIUM/LOW items) were resolved in a follow-up commit (observable STT fallback, windowed SSIM, ffmpeg returncode guard, SSIM tests); the full verification loop was rerun cleanly to 49 passed and architect re-review returned CLEAR/CLEAR/CLEAR + APPROVE.
